title: Operations Engineer
description:
Job Description

·      The Operations Engineer will play a critical role in supporting application operations and production readiness for a large-scale modernization initiative involving a COBOL/Java backend and React frontend. 

·      The role focuses on ensuring operational stability, smooth transition to BAU, and adherence to enterprise operational, security, and compliance standards. 

Required skills 

·      Strong experience in leading application operations and

·      Production support for modernization or transformation systems. 

·      Hands-on expertise with COBOL and Java-based applications, including operational readiness and post-go-live support for modernization projects.

·       Solid knowledge of AWS services, monitoring tools, and ITIL processes, including incident, problem, and change management. 

Key Responsibilities 

·      Operational Readiness & Transition Support transition and operational readiness activities for the modernization project (COBOL/Java backend, React frontend). 

·      Contribute to cutover preparation, go-live support, and knowledge transfer to ensure operational teams are fully prepared to take over post go-live. 

·      Assist in exit plan execution, ensuring complete knowledge capture and documentation during vendor handover or contract closure. 

·      Production Support & Issue Resolution Lead and support production operations, ensuring system stability and adherence to SLAs/OLAs.

·       Collaborate with Business Analysts, developers, and infrastructure teams to troubleshoot production issues.

·       Perform root cause analysis (RCA) and drive resolution of defects and recurring incidents.

·       Escalate risks, SLA breaches, and critical issues to the Operations Lead in a timely manner.

·       Operations Process & Governance Define, document, and maintain operational processes, including: Monitoring and alerting Escalation procedures Runbooks and support documentation Ensure compliance with enterprise security, audit, and regulatory standards, following established controls and guidelines.

·       Support ITIL-based processes across incident, problem, and change management. 

·      Reporting & Stakeholder Communication Prepare service delivery reports, operational dashboards, and meeting materials. 

·      Provide regular operational status updates to stakeholders and leadership.

·       Actively participate in maintenance, support, and governance meetings, documenting action items and ensuring follow-through.

·       DR / BCP Support Participate in Disaster Recovery (DR) and Business Continuity Planning (BCP) activities, including testing, validation, and documentation under the guidance of the Operations Lead. 

Required Qualifications & Experience 

·      3–6 years of experience in application operations, production support, or service delivery roles.

·       Strong hands-on experience supporting COBOL and Java-based enterprise applications. 

·      Experience working on modernization or transformation programs. 

·      Solid working knowledge of AWS services and application monitoring tools.

·       Strong understanding of ITIL processes and service management best practices. 

·      Excellent analytical, troubleshooting, and communication skills.

·       Ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams in a fast-paced environment.
